Package org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator

Class DecomposedQuant

java.lang.Object
org.eventb.internal.pptrans.translator.DecomposedQuant
Direct Known Subclasses:
Decomp2PhaseQuant
public class DecomposedQuant extends Object
Implements the decomposed quantification. The class is normaly used by first calling the addQuantifier Method one ore more times. Followed by calls to push. At the end a quantification is generated with a call to method makeQuantifiedExpression or makeQuantifiedPredicate.

    • addQuantifier

      public Expression addQuantifier(Type type, SourceLocation loc)
      Adds one or several instances of BoundIdentDecl, depending on type. If type is CPROD(INT, INT), two bound identifiers would be added.
      Parameters:
      type - type to be decomposed and added to the quantification
      loc - source location for the new expression
      Returns:
      a new Identifier or maplet of Identifiers that refers to the BoundIdentDecl instances.

    • addQuantifier

      public Expression addQuantifier(Type type, String name, SourceLocation loc)
      Adds one or several instances of BoundIdentDecl, depending on type. If type is CPROD(INT, INT), two bound identifiers would be added.
      Parameters:
      type - type to be decomposed and added to the quantification
      name - name for the new BoundIdentDecl instances
      loc - source location for the new expression
      Returns:
      a new Identifier or maplet of Identifiers that refers to the BoundIdentDecl instances.

    • push

      public Expression push(Expression expr)
      If an expression that was previously outside of a quantification is no inside, its externally bound identifiers have to be shifted. This can be done safely by a call to push. As soon as the first expression is pushed, no more calls to addQuantifier are allowed!
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to be pushed
      Returns:
      the expression with shifted bound identifiers

    • pushThroughAll

      public static Expression pushThroughAll(Expression expr, FormulaFactory ff, DecomposedQuant... quantifications)
      Exists for performance reasons. When an existing expression is placed inside two or more nested quantifications, pushThroughAll does all the necessary work with just one call to shiftBoundIdentifiers.
      Parameters:
      expr - the expression to be pushed
      ff - the formula factory to be used
      quantifications - the quantifications through which the expr needs to be pushed.
      Returns:
      the expression with shifted bound identifiers

    • makeQuantifiedExpression

      public Expression makeQuantifiedExpression(int tag, Predicate pred, Expression expr, SourceLocation loc)
      Generates a new quantified expression
      Parameters:
      tag - either Formula.EXISTS or Formula.FORALL
      pred - the predicate to be used in the quantified expression
      expr - the quantified expression
      loc - the source location
      Returns:
      a new quantified expression

    • makeQuantifiedPredicate

      public Predicate makeQuantifiedPredicate(int tag, Predicate pred, SourceLocation loc)
      Generates a new quantified predicate
      Parameters:
      tag - either Formula.EXISTS or Formula.FORALL
      pred - the quantified predicate
      loc - the source location
      Returns:
      a new quantified predicate
